title: Culturing Patient-Derived Malignant Hematopoietic Stem Cells in Engineered and Fully Humanized 3D Niches
author: Andrés García-García
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data underlying the figures in the publication “Culturing patient-derived malignant hematopoietic stem cells in engineered and fully humanized 3D niches”, published in  PNAS,    2021 , 118 (40) e2114227118.  

  DOI: 10.1073/pnas.2114227118  

 Table of contents: 

  1. AML data_Gene expression : qPCR data related to AML samples. 

  2. AML data_Protein : Luminex data related to AML samples. 

  3. AML data_Supernatant vs Niche : FACS data comparing AML cells in the supernatant and niche compartments. 

  4. AML data_Supernatant : FACS data showing AML cells in the supernatant along the time. 

  5. Chemotherapy_2D_FACS : FACS data showing leukemic cell viability in 2D. 

  6. Chemotherapy_3D_FACS : FACS data showing leukemic cell viability in 3D (engineered niches). 

  7. MPN data : FACS data related to MPN samples. 

  8. SV-N_FACS : FACS data characterizing SV-N. 

  9. SV-N_Gene expression : qPCR data characterizing SV-N. 

  10. UCSD-AML1_Niche_FACS : FACS data showing UCSD-AML1 cells in the niche at final analysis. 

  11. UCSD-AML1_Niche_Gene expression : qPCR data showing UCSD-AML1 cells in the niche at final analysis. 

  12. UCSD-AML1_Supernatant_FACS : FACS data showing UCSD-AML1 cells in the supernatant along the time. 

  13. UCSD-AML1_Supernatant_Gene expression : qPCR data related to UCSD-AML1 cells in the supernatant along the time. 

  14. UCSD-AML1_Supernatant_Protein : Luminex data related to UCSD-AML1 cells in the supernatant along the time. 

  15. Images engineered niches : Zip archive containing images of engineered niches.

keywords: Engineering Stem Cell Niches, AML/MPN, 3D Perfusion Bioreactors, Osteoblastic Niche, Stromal Vascular Niche.
